creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #2)
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #6)
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #7)
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #7)

Eventually I found this. I remembered that there's a request about gnutls but forgot where it is. Please reopen this PR or create another PR for new request next time. Thanks.

I added net/libngtcp2-gnutls for this request. Since libngtcp2 supports multiple crypto backends, it would be better to put them in separate ports.

(In reply to Leo Vandewoestijne from comment #8)

It should be fixed after ports 9ee495b654786fa3d74f45f964e7882ab9d722c9.
